installConfigs.instructions: Remote Atlassian MCP server for Jira and Confluence Cloud. No API key is required: on first connection Theia opens a browser to authorize access to your Atlassian site via OAuth, then stores the resulting token automatically.

Remote Atlassian MCP server for Jira and Confluence Cloud. No API key is required: on first connection Theia opens a browser to authorize access to your Atlassian site via OAuth, then stores the resulting token automatically.
